final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey).

Style/medium: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the central couple embracing/kissing on the city wall, with two figures standing in the distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 (central, embracing/kissing on the wall), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 (standing in the distance)
Scene/backdrop: must include the iconic city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a nostalgic romantic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 90s Hong Kong film direction — exact grading and saturation are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
